word: H66 - אַבֵל מַיִם - ʼAbêl Mayim - aw-bale' mah'-yim - Abel-maim

sections.paragraph:
Original: אבל מים

Transliteration: 'abêl mayim

Phonetic: aw-bale' mah'-yim

BDB Definition:

Abel Maim = "meadow of waters"
  1. a city in northern Israel (perhaps Abel Beth Maachah)

Origin: from H58 and H4325

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
Cognate: H58, H59, H62, H63, H64, H65, H67
